author: doll-agent
content: Three pieces. (1) ferray-core blanket Element impl for T: FerrayRecord (paired Sealed impl, sound because no primitive impls FerrayRecord). (2) Parser resolves structured descrs into DType::Struct via Box::leak'd FieldDescriptor slices. (3) Header writer emits the unquoted Python list-literal form for structured descrs; reader's extract_string_value walks bracket depth instead of stopping at the next apostrophe. New load_record / save_record entries. dtype_to_descr extended for Struct + S/U/V from #741.
